behavior_summary: Implements a one-time 'tomb ambush' triggered when the player enters the tomb's fast-area: it marks the tomb as encountered (sets global flag metKhumash), freezes the avatar, issues a tomb-guardian announcement, recenters the camera, spawns hostile NPC(s) at/around the tomb, forces them into combat and targets the avatar, then unfreezes the avatar.
Designed to run only once for the Khumash tomb: subsequent entries are ignored via the metKhumash guard.
Uses temporary locals to reference the triggering item/region (to read X/Y/Z and to bark) and to hold created NPC handles while initializing their hostility and combat targeting.
notable_control_flow: Entry guard: checks global flag metKhumash; if nonzero the handler returns immediately (prevents re-triggering).
Frozen window: setAvatarInStasis(1) is called to suspend player control while announcement/spawn sequence runs, and setAvatarInStasis(0) unfreezes afterwards.

Sequenced actions: read tomb item coordinates (Item::getX/Y/Z), spawn auxiliary processes/effects, call Item::bark to display the warning, Camera::setCenterOn to recenter view, then loop to create/pop/initialize NPC(s).
Per-NPC initialization: Npc::create -> Item::pop (place in world) -> Npc::setEnemyAlignment -> Npc::setInCombat -> Npc::setTarget (avatar).
open_questions: Exact NPC type id(s) and how many NPCs are spawned each time (script loops but counts/types are inferred).
Precise spawn offsets/placement logic relative to the tomb item coordinates (exact displacement vectors are not explicit).
The exact text content of the bark and whether multiple different barks or timing variations are used by the spawned FREE::* processes.
Whether additional side-effects (loot, quest state beyond metKhumash) occur from spawned NPCs or other engine signals not visible in the disassembly.

main_function.name: U8P_TOMB::hatch
main_function.purpose: One-time tomb-guardian ambush triggered on fast-area entry: freeze player, announce guardian, spawn hostile NPC(s) at the tomb, force combat targeting the avatar, and record that the tomb was encountered to prevent repetition.
entry_conditions: enterFastArea event for the tomb trigger region (fast-area event)
global flag metKhumash == 0 (only proceed if the event has not already occurred)

function_map.name: U8P_TOMB::hatch
function_map.role: Enter-fast-area handler that runs the tomb ambush sequence and sets metKhumash to prevent repeats.

function_map.name: U8P_TOMB::setAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Freeze/unfreeze avatar during the announcement/spawn sequence.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Read X coordinate of the tomb item/trigger to position spawned NPC(s).

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Read Y coordinate of the tomb item/trigger to position spawned NPC(s).

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Read Z layer of the tomb item/trigger to position spawned NPC(s).

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Display the tomb guardian announcement/warning message during the ambush.

function_map.name: Camera::setCenterOn
function_map.role: Recenters the camera (e.g., on the avatar) during the announcement/spawn sequence.

function_map.name: Npc::create
function_map.role: Create NPC instance(s) prior to placement in the world.

function_map.name: Item::pop
function_map.role: Place/pop the created NPC into the world at computed coordinates.

function_map.name: Npc::setEnemyAlignment
function_map.role: Make spawned NPC hostile to the avatar.

function_map.name: Npc::setInCombat
function_map.role: Activate combat behavior for spawned NPCs immediately.

function_map.name: Npc::setTarget
function_map.role: Assign the avatar as the combat target for spawned NPCs.

function_map.name: spawn (FREE::1C6D / FREE::1C8B)
function_map.role: Spawn auxiliary processes/effects used around the bark/animation sequence (likely visual/timing helpers).

external_calls.purpose: Freeze the avatar at start (arg=1) and unfreeze at end (arg=0) to control player input during the sequence.
Read the tomb item's X coordinate to determine NPC spawn placement.
Read the tomb item's Y coordinate to determine NPC spawn placement.
Read the tomb item's Z layer to determine spawn layer for NPCs/effects.
Start an auxiliary process/effect used during the bark/announcement or to provide timing.
Start another auxiliary process/effect used during the bark/announcement or to provide timing.
Cause the tomb item to emit a guardian/warning message to the player as part of the ambush announcement.
Recenter the game camera (likely on the avatar) during or immediately after the announcement.
Instantiate NPC object(s) that function as tomb guardians.
Place the newly created NPC instance(s) into the world at the computed tomb-adjacent coordinates.
Set spawned NPC(s) to hostile alignment so they attack the avatar.
Flag spawned NPC(s) as in combat to activate combat AI immediately.
Set the avatar as the combat target for spawned NPC(s).

reads.name: metKhumash
reads.likely_effect: Acts as a one-time-run guard: the script checks this flag and skips the U8P_TOMB::hatch sequence if it is nonzero.

writes.name: metKhumash
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 to record that the tomb ambush has occurred and to prevent future triggers.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements a one-time 'tomb ambush' triggered when the player enters the tomb's fast-area: it marks the tomb as encountered (sets global flag metKhumash), freezes the avatar, issues a tomb-guardian announcement, recenters the camera, spawns hostile NPC(s) at/around the tomb, forces them into combat and targets the avatar, then unfreezes the avatar.
